title: centaurium phenax
intro: Centaurium phenax, also known as mountain centaury, is a species of flowering plant in the gentian family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Centaurium phenax include its ability to soothe respiratory issues, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of bronchitis and coughs. The plant is typically prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, and is often used in folk medicine to promote overall well-being.
